en.question: All cats are dogs. All dogs are animals. Conclusion: All cats are animals. Valid?
en.explanation: Transitivity: all A are B, all B are C ⇒ all A are C. Valid syllogism.

hi.question: सभी बिल्लियाँ कुत्ते। सभी कुत्ते जानवर। निष्कर्ष: सभी बिल्लियाँ जानवर। वैध?
hi.explanation: संक्रमण: सभी A, B; सभी B, C ⇒ सभी A, C। वैध न्यायवाक्य।

en.question: Some pens are pencils. All pencils are books. Conclusions: I. Some pens are books. II. All books are pencils.
en.explanation: Some pens→pencils→books means some pens are books (I). II doesn't follow (reverse not true).

hi.question: कुछ पेन पेंसिल। सभी पेंसिल किताबें। I. कुछ पेन किताबें। II. सभी किताबें पेंसिल।
hi.explanation: I सही, II गलत (उल्टा सत्य नहीं)।

en.question: All chairs are tables. Some tables wooden. No wooden is metal. I. Some chairs wooden. II. No table metal. III. Some tables not metal.
en.explanation: Chairs may not overlap wooden, I doesn't follow. Some tables could be metal, II doesn't. Tables that are wooden ≠ metal, so some tables not metal (III).

hi.question: सभी कुर्सियाँ मेज। कुछ मेज लकड़ी। कोई लकड़ी धातु नहीं। I,II,III में कौन?

en.question: All cats are dogs. Some dogs are rats. I. Some cats rats. II. No cat rat.
en.explanation: Cats subset of dogs. Rats overlap dogs but may not include cats. Neither follows.

hi.question: सभी बिल्लियाँ कुत्ते। कुछ कुत्ते चूहे। I,II?
hi.explanation: बिल्लियाँ और चूहों का ओवरलैप निश्चित नहीं। कोई अनुसरण नहीं।

en.question: Some pens pencils. All pencils erasers. I. Some pens erasers. II. All erasers pencils.
en.explanation: Pens that are pencils are erasers (I). II doesn't follow.

hi.question: कुछ पेन पेंसिल। सभी पेंसिल इरेज़र। I,II?

en.question: All fans lights. No light heater. I. No fan heater. II. Some lights fans.
en.explanation: Fans⊂lights, lights∩heaters=∅. No fan heater (I). Some lights are fans (II). Both follow.

hi.question: सभी पंखे लाइट। कोई लाइट हीटर नहीं। I,II?

en.question: Some actors singers. All singers dancers. No dancer painter. I. Some actors painters. II. No actor painter.
en.explanation: Actor-singers are dancers→not painters. Other actors could be painters. Neither follows definitively.

hi.question: कुछ कलाकार गायक। सभी गायक नर्तक। कोई नर्तक चित्रकार नहीं। I,II?

en.question: All mangoes fruits. Some fruits sweet. I. All mangoes sweet. II. Some mangoes sweet.
en.explanation: Sweet fruits may not include mangoes. Neither follows.

hi.question: सभी आम फल। कुछ फल मीठे। I,II?
hi.explanation: कोई निश्चित रूप से अनुसरण नहीं करता।
